summary: Never use a simple hex-sequence like `a1b2c3d4e5f6` as an Alembic revision ID — the existing migration set contains files with IDs following this pattern and conflicts will produce a `CycleDetected` error. Use `python -m alembic revision -m "..."` to generate a unique ID, or pick a random 12-char alphanumeric string that doesn't appear in `ls backend/app/alembic/versions/` output.
